title: Senior Revenue Manager at Cox & Kings India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Cox & Kings India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Cox & Kings India in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cox & Kings India:
Cox & Kings India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cox & Kings India!
